visual_description: A man and a woman stand facing each other in a dark, cavernous space with large, serpentine heads carved into the walls. The man, wearing a dark jacket over a striped shirt, reaches out and pulls the woman into a tight embrace. They remain locked in the hug, their backs to the camera, as the scene fades to black.
audio_description: A low, ominous musical score plays, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere.
